violations.text: The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. PIC stated closing mechanism had fallen from door, PIC to schedule handyman for replacement. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. Inspector provided application during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Staff provided during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the service area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
